ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species the dataset is derived from */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* File format of the dataset */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the dataset */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the project */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the researcher */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the researcher */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being analyzed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher conducting the analysis */,
  "date_performed" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., variant calling, abundance estimation) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the analysis */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm used for the analysis */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset used */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset accessed */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result accessed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filter_settings" (
  "filter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filter setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the filter setting */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value used in the filter */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* Algorithm for which the filter is used */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the filter setting */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the filter setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "principal_investigator" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_principal_investigator FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
